item.title: Show & Tell Livestream Recap
item.description:
Hey folks,

In case you missed our Show & Tell livestream yesterday, here's the tl;dr of everything we covered:

For more details check out our Recap Blog, or get caught up by watching the stream back on YouTube.

See you on the battlefield!

— The Total War Team

For the latest news and announcements, don't forget to visit our official social channels.

SteamXFacebookInstagramDiscordBluesky

item.title: April Community Update
item.description:
​Hello Space Marines,

This month has been quite busy for us, which means we’ve got a lot to share with you! In this Community Update we’ll get into more details with the Roadmap, Patch 13’s content, and the current Community Event.

TWELVE MILLION PLAYERS 🫂

First of all, we’re incredibly happy to announce that we’ve reached 12 MILLION players!!! 🍾 🎉

A couple years ago, we had great hopes for this project. Today, it has surpassed even our wildest dreams. Thank you twelve million times over. 💙

​

UPDATED YEAR 2 ROADMAP 🎯

Here is the up-to-date Year 2 Roadmap you’ve been waiting for.

​Here are a few notable highlights from this new Roadmap: 👇

  • The “REDACTED” DLC is going to be the Salamanders Champion Pack 2

  • We are excited to announce Wargear rework that will allow players to use Class specific Wargear on other classes. I.e. capes and Iron Halos on Tactical. You will have to earn the right to do so in game. The update will be split into 2. In Patch 13, we will be adding Capes and Iron Halos, in Patch 14 we will be adding Tabards and Robes. With this you can strike out "something that we've said we are never going to do" from the list of things we've said about customization. 😉

  • Siege mode will get a big overhaul and a ton of new features. Like gameplay modifiers that will allow specific build crafting. 

​

YOUR DUTY IS NOT YET DONE, BROTHER…

Space Marine 2’s live support has officially been extended into a third year, bringing even more free updates and DLC content. 🎉 Lately, our updates have been very well received by the community, which really motivates us to keep up the momentum for the third year. 😁

Everything that didn’t make it into the updated Year 2 roadmap will now roll over into Year 3, even though we’re not ready to share more details just yet. Don’t worry, all content that has been postponed will remain free, as it was planned for Year 2.

We’re really excited about what’s coming, and we think you will be too!

More info coming very soon 😉
Stay tuned.

PATCH 13 🔜

Let’s dive into the upcoming content together.

Please note that this time, there will not be a Public Test Server.

Iron Hands Chapter Pack (Season Pass 2)

The Iron Hands Chapter pack will include a Techmarine Champion and a skin for its signature weapon, the Omnissian Axe.

Additionally, Iron Hands-themed armour pieces will be added as part of the Chapter Customisation Pack: Left & Right Greaves, Left & Right Gauntlets, Left & Right Pauldrons & decals. Symbol customisation will be enabled with this pauldron!

[carousel][/carousel]

New PvE Map

The upcoming new Operation takes place on Kadaku. Your squad will have to investigate Chaos activity near a Cadian base and stop an unholy ritual. We can’t reveal much of it yet, but here’s a glimpse of how it’ll look:

[carousel][/carousel]

​

Ultragrind Ordeals and Wargear Sharing

New Ordeals, the “Trials of Resolve” will be implemented. These Ordeals are particularly hard to achieve and are meant to test your skills on the long run. Each Ordeal will have up to 3 difficulty tiers. Some of them will require you to complete an Operation a hundred times, or slaying three Majoris or higher enemies with a single headshot on Absolute difficulty for instance. 

Good luck! 😉

​Starting with Patch 13, you will be able to equip Wargear that was previously only available to other Classes. There are new cloak and Iron Halo items that can be unlocked through these Ultragrind Ordeals. Note that you won’t have to grind for every single wargear, some will be shared right away. However, lore restrictions still apply, for instance: Snipers won’t be able to equip the Iron Halo. 

So, you will be able to equip additional cloaks and Iron Halos. And with Patch 14, we’ll also add sharing for tabards and robes (like the full Bulwark robe).

​

Siege Mode Update

Several new additions are coming, let’s take a closer look.

  • New items will be added to the Siege shop, now you can earn Accolades for completing Siege mode. New items include a Commissar to boost Cadians, explosive mines, explosive barrels, turrets and a Techpriest to defend as he gets you currency boosts.

  • New modifiers will be introduced including both Blessings and Atonements. It will be up to you to pick and choose them to customise your mission. Pick 1 Blessing amongst 3 every 5 waves. One Atonement is applied every 5 waves as well. You can reroll it against some Siege currency. 

  • The Hive Tyrant and the Vortex Beast can now be encountered as Bosses.

  • The timer is getting a rework too. Now, when the timer’s over, you won’t get a Game Over – enemies become subsequently harder to beat. 

Battle Barge Practice Arena

The Practice Arena is a new addition to the Battle Barge. Only available in solo, this new area allows you to test your weapons on the enemies of your choice, in the difficulty of your choice. You will have a display showing the total damage dealt and your damage per second. Ideal to try out new weapons, check the most efficient combos and so on.

Check our 6min gameplay video for a first look at it.

Or if you’re looking for a fun challenge, spawn as many enemies as possible and try to survive!

​

3 Weapon Variants for Heroic Deeds

Three new Heroic weapons will be added with this patch:

  • Plasma Pistol (Charged shot damage is increased)

  • Chainsword - Block type. This marks the return of the Artificer Block Chainsword that some of you were missing. (The number of blocking stacks is increased to 3 with a higher damage bonus for the third stack and slightly decreased bonus for the second)

  • Power Axe - Block type (After a perfect block you can move out of the Power Stance and perform a Power Backstep with the next hold attack)

​

New Weapon - Bolt Carbine Sidearm

A new secondary weapon will be added: the Secondary Carbine SMG, a close-range carbine with extremely rapid fire. Available for Bulwark and Assault.

Perks Loadout

This was one of the most requested QoL features: you will now have the possibility to have up to 3 perks loadouts (in a similar way to what already exists for the weapons), for easier selection and less menu navigation. Customise a loadout linked to a weapon, and easily equip it in the Armouring Hall. 

6 Armour Variants for Heroic Deeds

New armour parts will also be added as rewards in the Refinement & Redemption shop.

COMMUNITY EVENT 💥

This month, we command that you complete 5 Operations as Vanguard or Sniper, to earn the Infiltrator Helmet.

You have until May 6th to successfully complete your mission. Onward, Space Marines! ⚔️

​

That’s it for this month!

Thank you for supporting us and helping us improve Space Marine 2. We remain very attentive to your feedback. 

If you’d like to keep yourself informed on the latest news, make sure you follow our socials: Instagram, Facebook, X, Threads, Bluesky.

🪽 The Emperor Protects

-The Saber and Focus teams

item.title: Total War: WARHAMMER III - More War: Astragoth vs Grimgor Multiplayer Battle
item.description:
Greetings!

Meet our new colleagues - Will Grimgor and Andrew Astragoth as they battle it out in More War! ⚔️

Who is getting your favour? 👀



— The Total War Team

For the latest news and announcements, don't forget to visit our official social channels. Steam X Facebook Instagram Discord [url=https://bsky.app/profile/totalwar.bsky.social style=button]Bluesky[/url]

item.title: Console Gits on Da Way wiv CROSSPLAY!
item.description:
OI GITS!

Been a hot minute since we announced the cross play console version of Speed Freeks was on the way, and we FINALLY can confirm some news that should get your squig shaking.

SPEED FREEKS IS LAUNCHING ON MAY 21ST - YEAH LIKE, LITERALLY LESS THAN A MONTH AWAY.

Here's a loud new trailer for you to enjoy and share with your console mates and get em from 'umies to Speed Freeks in advance.


Okay, why is that news for PC players?!

Two wonderful little words. Cross Play. It means you'll be seeing more people in all the lobbies, Folks from OTHER PC platforms. Folks from console platforms, all Racin' Krumpin' Creatin' and Fightin' together with you. Would bring a tear to my eye if the concept of unlimited dakka wasn't so exciting.


Nice, How can I help?

We'll be getting a good ol' bit of attention and a push from the console partners and audiences, so if you spot any socials out in the wild, any posts on forums asking about the game, glow 'em up with us and get 'em excited. The more gitz hitting on launch day the better!

We'll be soft testing with some select console folks over the next couple of weeks just to be super sure everything is rocking, so if you spot any PLAYERS from the consoles out in the wild, give 'em a good time. Then blow 'em up. It's only polite.

There IS one or two bits of extra PC specific news coming up too, but we'll save that for another day!

Additionally, Tell your mates wherever they play to drop a wishlist on their console of choice by searching on these links (or add them to your own if you already play!) Little numbers add up and make the big head boiz push more wazzah behind trailers and that, so more the merrier.

Wishlist on PS5: https://store.playstation.com/en-gb/concept/10016640
Wishlist on XBOX: https://www.xbox.com/en-gb/games/store/Warhammer-40000-speed-freeks/9PD4F5G2LM93

There's also a nifty physical Ps5 version available in various locations for the folks that still love collecting. Have a click on the dropdown for your region of choice and see where it's available :

Retail: https://wiredproductions.com/games/warhammer-40000-speed-freeks/#where-to-buy That's it for now.
Any questions about the console version, what crossplay means, any feedback or suggestions, let us know here or in Discord and we'll keep an eye!

Until then, get your krumpin' skills back sharp, it's gonna be loud!

item.title: Mod Manager Update
item.description:
Hey folks,

We’ve just rolled out an update to the Total War: WARHAMMER III Mod Manager, bringing with it several improvements based on player feedback and our internal testing:

  • Improved performance for large mod libraries

    • Faster mass mod activation, including for users with very large mod lists

    • Reduced startup time in cases where hundreds of mods are installed

    • Additional performance improvements and general code clean-up

  • Improved mod ordering and selection in edge cases

    • Improved how mods are ordered and selected in cases where mods share the same pack name and/or checksum. This addresses situations where the UI could previously behave in a confusing way, such as when local modder versions matched subscribed versions.

  • Improved filter search

    • Search now matches against:

      • Mod title

      • Pack file name

      • Steam Workshop mod ID

  • UI improvements and fixes to mod source, subscription, and version information

  • Fixed issues with mod source tooltips in the mod profile table

    • Fixed cases where the option to subscribe was not offered for unsubscribed mods

    • Updated icons to show whether a mod is subscribed and whether it is up to date

    • Made tooltip text clearer and more helpful

    • Improved handling of cases where a mod is subscribed but no matching local version is available

    • Improved subscription status and “latest version” indication

    • Added support for showing correct mod details, such as title and tags, even when a mod is not subscribed or is subscribed by a different user on a family account

    • Fixed duplicate installed mod entries for some setups

    • Added an arrow symbol to menu items that open URLs in a web browser.

  • Fixed mod profile display on startup

    • Fixed an issue where the previously used mod profile was not shown immediately on startup until the mouse moved over the window.

  • Font and text rendering improvements

    • Multiple fixes and improvements to font and text rendering

    • Removed remaining dependency on system fonts

  • Add game name to window title

  • Improved download progress feedback

As always, if you run into any issues while using the mod manager, or if you have any suggestions for improvements, please do share them over in our Mod Manager forum board.

See you on the battlefield!

— Steve

For the latest news and announcements, don't forget to visit our official social channels.

SteamXFacebookInstagramDiscordBluesky
